summary.ja: 2026年6月29日週の市場分析では、BitPredictableのLSTMモデルが主要な暗号資産の大半についてほぼ変動なし（flat）の予測を出しています。特に、[bitcoin](/coins/bitcoin)は-0.84%、[ethereum](/coins/ethereum)は-0.97%の予測になっています。一方で、[dogecoin](/coins/dogecoin)は+3.15%の予

body.en:
6 out of 6 major coins tracked by the BitPredictable LSTM AI model are predicted to move less than 1.1% this week, with [bitcoin](/coins/bitcoin) leading the pack with a -0.84% predicted movement and a confidence level of 80%. This uniform lack of momentum across the board suggests a period of consolidation, as the market digests recent news and awaits new catalysts. Notably, the predicted movements are not only flat but also closely clustered, with [ethereum](/coins/ethereum) at -0.97%, [binancecoin](/coins/binancecoin) at -0.67%, [solana](/coins/solana) at +0.99%, [ripple](/coins/ripple) at -1.05%, and [dogecoin](/coins/dogecoin) at +3.15%. The relatively high confidence levels across these predictions, ranging from 71% to 90%, underscore the model's conviction in this outlook.

## Key Signals This Week
A closer examination of the predictions reveals that while most coins are expected to remain stable, [dogecoin](/coins/dogecoin) stands out with a +3.15% predicted movement and a high confidence level of 90%. This discrepancy may indicate underlying strengths or weaknesses in the [dogecoin](/coins/dogecoin) ecosystem that are not immediately apparent. On the other hand, [ripple](/coins/ripple) and [ethereum](/coins/ethereum) are predicted to decline by -1.05% and -0.97%, respectively, which could be a sign of short-term bearish sentiment. The [CoinDesk] article [Collateral, not yield, will decide which stablecoins win](https://www.coindesk.com/opinion/2026/07/05/collateral-not-yield-will-decide-which-stablecoins-win) highlights the importance of stablecoin collateralization, which may have implications for the broader crypto market.

## Trading Agent Update
The Trading Agent, crypto-ace, had a strong week with 6 wins and only 1 loss, resulting in a win rate of 86% for the week. This performance is a significant improvement over the agent's cumulative return of -1.43% and win rate of 47%. The high signal quality noted by the agent suggests that the model's predictions were accurate and actionable, allowing the agent to capitalize on market opportunities. The Sharpe ratio of -2.50, however, indicates that the agent's returns have been highly volatile, and further refinement may be necessary to optimize performance.

## What to Watch
As the market enters a period of consolidation, it is essential to monitor news and events that could potentially disrupt the status quo. The [CoinDesk] article [Banks have stopped asking if stablecoins belong in finance, now they're considering how](https://www.coindesk.com/business/2026/07/05/banks-have-stopped-asking-if-stablecoins-belong-in-finance-now-they-re-considering-how) suggests that stablecoins are gaining traction in the traditional financial sector, which could have significant implications for the crypto market. Additionally, the [Cointelegraph] article [Bitcoin nears $63.5K into weekly close as trader warns of 'terrible' Monday](https://cointelegraph.com/markets/bitcoin-nears-635k-into-weekly-close-as-trader-warns-of-terrible-monday?utm_source=rss_feed&utm_medium=rss&utm_campaign=rss_partner_inbound) highlights the potential for market volatility in the coming week.

This analysis is for informational purposes only and should not be considered as investment advice.

## In the News

Clarity and Congress's summer break: State of Crypto ([CoinDesk](https://www.coindesk.com/policy/2026/07/05/clarity-and-congress-s-summer-break-state-of-crypto))

Americans traded $571 million on Polymarket politic bets despite U.S. ban ([CoinDesk](https://www.coindesk.com/tech/2026/07/03/americans-traded-usd571-million-on-polymarket-politic-bets-despite-u-s-ban))

Kalshi and prediction market sector embroiled in mixed bag of legal fights across U.S. ([CoinDesk](https://www.coindesk.com/news-analysis/2026/07/02/kalshi-and-prediction-market-sector-embroiled-in-mixed-bag-of-legal-fights-across-u-s))
body.ja:
2026年6月29日週の市場分析では、BitPredictableのLSTMモデルが主要な暗号資産の大半についてほぼ変動なし（flat）の予測を出しています。特に、[bitcoin](/coins/bitcoin)は-0.84%、[ethereum](/coins/ethereum)は-0.97%の予測になっています。一方で、[dogecoin](/coins/dogecoin)は+3.15%の予測で、他のコインよりも相対的に高い値動きが見込まれています。

## 注目シグナル
最近のニュースでは、[CoinDesk]の記事「[Banks have stopped asking if stablecoins belong in finance, now they're considering how](https://www.coindesk.com/business/2026/07/05/banks-have-stopped-asking-if-stablecoins-belong-in-finance-now-they-re-considering-how)」が注目されています。ここで言及されているのは、銀行が安定した金融商品としての安定コイン（stablecoin）の役割を検討し始めたことです。このような動きは、暗号資産の金融への取り組みが進展していることを示しています。

## トレードエージェントの状況
トレーディングエージェント「crypto-ace」の統計を見ると、累積リターンは-1.43%、勝率は47%でした。ただし、最近の1週間では6勝1敗と強いパフォーマンスを示しています。エージェントのノートによると、シグナル品質が高かったことが要因のひとつです。Sharpe比率は-2.50と低い値になっていますが、エージェントの全体的なパフォーマンスについては、より多くのトレードデータが必要です。

## 来週のチェックポイント
来週は、主要な暗号資産の動向が注目されます。特に、[solana](/coins/solana)や[ripple](/coins/ripple)の動きがどうなるかを見極めることが重要です。さらに、[CoinDesk]の記事「[Clarity and Congress's summer break: State of Crypto](https://www.coindesk.com/policy/2026/07/05/clarity-and-congress-s-summer-break-state-of-crypto)」で言及されているような規制の動向にも注視が必要です。

投資助言ではありません
